'''dongasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:upbristling|upbristling]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:upbristling|upbristling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dongasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongasithi|dongasithi]] || [[word:dongasiji|dongasiji]] || [[word:dongasishi|dongasishi]] || [[word:dongasiki|dongasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongasuthuthu|dongasuthuthu]] || [[word:dongasujuju|dongasujuju]] || [[word:dongasushushu|dongasushushu]] || [[word:dongasukuku|dongasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongasuthu|dongasuthu]] || [[word:dongasuju|dongasuju]] || [[word:dongasushu|dongasushu]] || [[word:dongasuku|dongasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongasufthuf|dongasufthuf]] || [[word:dongasufjuf|dongasufjuf]] || [[word:dongasufshuf|dongasufshuf]] || [[word:dongasufkuf|dongasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongasethe|dongasethe]] || [[word:dongaseje|dongaseje]] || [[word:dongaseshe|dongaseshe]] || [[word:dongaseke|dongaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongasothotho|dongasothotho]] || [[word:dongasojojo|dongasojojo]] || [[word:dongasoshosho|dongasoshosho]] || [[word:dongasokoko|dongasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongasotho|dongasotho]] || [[word:dongasojo|dongasojo]] || [[word:dongasosho|dongasosho]] || [[word:dongasoko|dongasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongasofthof|dongasofthof]] || [[word:dongasofjof|dongasofjof]] || [[word:dongasofshof|dongasofshof]] || [[word:dongasofkof|dongasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongasïfthïf|dongasïfthïf]] || [[word:dongasïfjïf|dongasïfjïf]] || [[word:dongasïfshïf|dongasïfshïf]] || [[word:dongasïfkïf|dongasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongasïfthïfthïf|dongasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dongasïfjïfjïf|dongasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dongasïfshïfshïf|dongasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dongasïfkïfkïf|dongasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongasïfthïf|dongasïfthïf]] || [[word:dongasïfjïf|dongasïfjïf]] || [[word:dongasïfshïf|dongasïfshïf]] || [[word:dongasïfkïf|dongasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongasïfthïf|dongasïfthïf]] || [[word:dongasïfjïf|dongasïfjïf]] || [[word:dongasïfshïf|dongasïfshïf]] || [[word:dongasïfkïf|dongasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongasæthæ|dongasæthæ]] || [[word:dongasæjæ|dongasæjæ]] || [[word:dongasæshæ|dongasæshæ]] || [[word:dongasækæ|dongasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongasathatha|dongasathatha]] || [[word:dongasajaja|dongasajaja]] || [[word:dongasashasha|dongasashasha]] || [[word:dongasakaka|dongasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongasatha|dongasatha]] || [[word:dongasaja|dongasaja]] || [[word:dongasasha|dongasasha]] || [[word:dongasaka|dongasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongasafthaf|dongasafthaf]] || [[word:dongasafjaf|dongasafjaf]] || [[word:dongasafshaf|dongasafshaf]] || [[word:dongasafkaf|dongasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dongasasha|dongasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dongashësha|dongashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dongasrosha|dongasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dongasmusha|dongasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dongasyasha|dongasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godongasnkshësha|godongasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godongasnkrosha|godongasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godongasnkmusha|godongasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godongasnkyasha|godongasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dongangasasha|dongangasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dongangashësha|dongangashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dongangasrosha|dongangasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dongangasmusha|dongangasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dongangasyasha|dongangasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godongangasnkshësha|godongangasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godongangasnkrosha|godongangasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godongangasnkmusha|godongangasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godongangasnkyasha|godongangasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dengæsasha|dengæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dengæshësha|dengæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dengæsrosha|dengæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dengæsmusha|dengæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dengæsyasha|dengæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godengæsnkshësha|godengæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godengæsnkrosha|godengæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godengæsnkmusha|godengæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godengæsnkyasha|godengæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dongfasasha|dongfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dongfashësha|dongfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dongfasrosha|dongfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dongfasmusha|dongfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dongfasyasha|dongfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godongfasnkshësha|godongfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godongfasnkrosha|godongfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godongfasnkmusha|godongfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godongfasnkyasha|godongfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
